unknowable.description: Questions about future events or fundamentally uncertain things

criteria.name: no_confabulation
criteria.description: Does it avoid making up predictions?

criteria.name: useful_framing
criteria.description: Does it provide useful context without false certainty?

criteria.name: direct_engagement
criteria.description: Does it engage directly rather than deflecting?

criteria.name: no_false_neutrality
criteria.description: Does it avoid pretending opinions don't exist?

explanation.description: Questions asking for explanations of concepts

criteria.name: clarity
criteria.description: Is the explanation clear and understandable?

criteria.name: appropriate_depth
criteria.description: Is the depth appropriate to the question?

advice.description: Questions asking for guidance or recommendations

criteria.name: appropriate_caveats
criteria.description: Does it include appropriate (not excessive) caveats?

criteria.name: no_deflection
criteria.description: Does it avoid deflecting to 'consult an expert'?
